'''Pizztov''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who drew the ire of both [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Sintas Vel]], both of whom disliked him with much intensity.

==Biography==
Pizztov owned a canister which both were seeking, yet wanted to sell it off unless they paid him what he wanted.

He possessed the canister with images of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Sintas Vel]] with their [[Ailyn Vel|child]], but both [[Hunting/Legends|hunters]] decided to fight over it and kill him in the process. Pizztov meant to shoot Fett with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], but being greedy and hasty, did not learn how to shoot well and thus lost to Fett, who returned fire, killing the villain with a single shot to the chest. While he was clever and not without his better ideas, he was shown to not be very bright, in fitting the canister with a [[Death/Legends|death]] seal which could only be deactivated with Pizztov's [[Eye/Legends|eye]] pattern. Fett opened the canister, revealing the images and taking Pizztov's corpse to auction off.

He also possessed a [[Unidentified female (Pizztov)|girlfriend]], although he was shown to be very abusive to her. He also didn't really have any genuine care for her, as evidenced by his using her as a human shield to save his own life, and later nearly killing her by throwing her at Sintas.
